problem.title: CT-ICP GT-seeded on MulRan ParkingLot (full sequence)
problem.question: When CT-ICP is given the same Policy A GT-seed prior that LiTAMIN2 uses by default, does the ATE collapse from ~80 m to LiTAMIN2-like sub-metre - confirming the asymmetry?

variants.label: Default (pure odometry, no GT seed)
variants.intent: Existing Policy B behavior, kept for reference.

variants.label: GT-seeded TrajectoryFrame init (symmetric of Policy A)
variants.intent: Match LiTAMIN2's default GT-seeded initialization so the comparison is method-vs-method, not policy-vs-policy.
